injuries.comment: The Islanders announced that DeAngelo is a game-time decision for Tuesday's (Dec. 2) game.
The Islanders said on Wednesday (Nov. 26) that Pageau is expected to be sidelined for another 2-3 weeks but should return before Christmas.
Point doesn't have a timetable for his return to the lineup, according to Lightning reporter Gabby Shirley on Monday (Dec. 1).
Raddysh will not be in attendance for Monday's (Dec. 1) practice for personal reasons, Lightning reporter Gabby Shirley reports.
